DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT JOSE GUERRERO's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, as to the third, fourth, fifth and eighth causes of action in the first amended complaint filed by plaintiffs Leah and Christian Groh is SUSTAINED with twenty days leave to amend as to the fourth cause of action for breach of the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing and the fifth cause of action for breach of warranty and OVERRULED as to the other two causes of action. The contract and negligence causes of action are adequately alleged and the negligence cause of action is not necessarily barred by the economic loss rule. The implied covenant and breach of warranty claims do not allege a distinct contract breach from the contract claim. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Not reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike References To Punitive Damages In The First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS WILKINSON DESIGN & CONSTRUCTION, INC. and PAVIL WILKINSON'S Motion To Strike References To Punitive Damages In The First Amended Complaint filed by plaintiffs Leah and Christian Groh is DENIED. The FAC adequately alleges punitive damages liability against the Wilkinson defendants based on their alleged fraudulent conduct. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Not reported. (D302)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT THE WINDOW AND DOOR SHOP, INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, as to the second, fourth and fifth causes of action in the first amended complaint filed by plaintiffs Leah and Christian Groh is SUSTAINED with twenty days leave to amend as to the fourth cause of action for breach of the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing and the fifth cause of action for breach of warranty and OVERRULED as to the second cause of action for breach of contract claim. The contract cause of action is alleged.The implied covenant and breach of warranty claims do not allege a distinct contract breach from the contract claim. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Not reported. (D302)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS PAVIL WILKINSON and WILKINSON DESIGN & CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, as to the first, fourth, fifth, sixth, seventh and eighth causes of action in the first amended complaint filed by plaintiffs Leah and Christian Groh is SUSTAINED with twenty days leave to amend as to the fourth cause of action for breach of the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing and OVERRULED as to all other causes of action. Paragraph 22 of the FAC alleges sufficient facts to support imposing alter ego liability on Mr. Wilkinson. The implied covenant claim does not allege a distinct contract breach from the contract claim. The fraud and negligent misrepresentation claims are adequately alleged. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported. (D302)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
